word: G4295 - πρόκειμαι - prókeimai - prok'-i-mahee - Be first

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πρόκειμαι

- Transliteration: Prokeimai

- Phonetic: prok'-i-mahee

- Definition:

1. to lie or be placed before (a person or a thing) or in front of

2. to set before

a. to be placed before the eyes, to lie in sight

1. to stand forth

b. to be appointed, destined

c. to be there, be present, be at hand

- Origin: from G4253 and G2749

- TDNT entry: 13:56,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2749; to lie before the view that is (figuratively) to be present (to the mind) to stand forth (as an example or reward): - be first set before (forth).
